message:
🐛 Fix MDX sanitizer stripping prose words starting with "on" (#1271)

The event-handler regex in transformMdx.ts was too broad: it matched
any whitespace + on[a-z]+ pattern, which stripped normal English words
like "onto", "once", "one", "only" from rendered docs pages.

The fix requires an `=` sign after the attribute name, since real HTML
event handlers (onclick, onload, etc.) always use `attribute=value`
syntax. This preserves prose while still stripping malicious handlers.

Fixes #1262

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
